mentions.note: Gold market dominated by speculators; Agnico CEO noted young flippers dominate. Cramer prefers Agnico over Barrick on consistent operational execution.

Closed-loop gas + power + carbon capture model positions for AI datacenter energy boom. 1.5 GW operational, Meta partnership, Texas-based with Barnett Shale upside. Hyperscalers switching to gas+CCUS.
Private equity cohort rallies on confidence return and potential deal activity acceleration; employee-bought private credit exposure shows management alignment.
Record quarter, $46B guidance, $16B cash flow, $50B buyback ($25B accelerated). Agent Force + Slack + AI agents unlock dual human+agentic monetization; stock at $186 too cheap per CEO.
Trading at 19x earnings despite legal losses; appeals likely and First Amendment protections should trim awards. Multiple compression overdone; patient buyers rewarded post-appeal clarity.

Unilever food business merger (Hellmann's, Colman's, Knorr) creates aisle dominance and synergy value. Trading 16x, 3.81% yield; currently unloved but deals prove strategic strength. Patient holders rewarded in 6 months.
Receives $2B from Nvidia for AI infrastructure partnership; 13% rally reflects migration opportunity from non-Nvidia to Nvidia ecosystem; infrastructure play benefits.
Trading at 14x earnings (compressed like boring bank stock); Marvell partnership ($2B) validates platform leadership; multiple re-expansion as war ends and rates fall.
Todd McKinnon demonstrates consistent earnings power. Buyer even below cost basis; identity access management demand persistent across cycles.

CEO Arora bought $10M stock signaling confidence; cybersecurity undervalued as AI accelerant not detractor. Real-time defense infrastructure + governance scaffolding essential as attackers weaponize AI.

Jetro acquisition ($21.6B + shares) natural bolt-on for restaurant supply scale and food service distribution. 15x earnings, 3% yield. Market oversold; synergies + closed deal = re-rating in 6 months.
AI datacenter buildout in full swing; stock 'been too high ever since it got too high' but core infrastructure play worth holding for AI capex cycle.
Sector hot but parabolic move into peace signals likely reverses; take profits tomorrow as war-driven chemical inflation unwinds.
